title: Responsibility
doc_html:
§127. Responsibility

            Any physician or medical facility who causes in vitro fertilization of a human embryo will be directly responsible for the in vitro safekeeping of the fertilized human embryo.

            Acts 1986, No. 964, §1; Acts 2025, No. 116, §1.
doc_text:
§127.  Responsibility
Any physician or medical facility who causes in vitro fertilization of a human embryo
will be directly responsible for the in vitro safekeeping of the fertilized human embryo.
Acts 1986, No. 964, §1; Acts 2025, No. 116, §1.
